basic_details.job_title: SBI Specialist Cadre Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: State Bank of India has released the official Specialist Cadre Officer Notification 2026 on 2026 at SBI Official Website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the SBI Specialist Cadre Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 60–62 years (post-wise) with a qualification of Graduate can apply online from 18-06-2026 to 08-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Max 62 years for Defence Banking Advisor (Navy) and Advisor (CAPF), Max 60 years for Circle Defence Banking Advisor.
age_limit.details: Defence Banking Advisor (Navy): Maximum 62 years Advisor (Central Armed Police Force): Maximum 62 years Circle Defence Banking Advisor (CDBA): Maximum 60 years

qualification.details: Defence Banking Advisor (Navy): Retired from the rank of Vice Admiral/Rear Admiral from Indian Navy. Advisor (Central Armed Police Force): Retired in the rank of Director General (DG) with minimum 3 years experience in CAPF. Circle Defence Banking Advisor (CDBA): Retired from the rank of Major General or Brigadier.

salary_details.pay_scale: CTC of Rs. 37.95 lakhs p.a. for Defence Banking Advisor (Navy), CTC of Rs. 26.95 lakhs p.a. for Advisor (CAPF) and Circle Defence Banking Advisor.
salary_details.details: Defence Banking Advisor (Navy): CTC of Rs. 37.95 lakhs per annum (Fixed Rs 34.50 lakhs p.a., Variable* (10% of Fixed Pay): Rs 3.45 lakhs p.a.) (No other increments) Advisor (Central Armed Police Force): CTC of Rs. 26.95 lakhs per annum (Fixed Rs 24.50 lakhs p.a., Variable* (10% of Fixed Pay) – Rs 2.45 lakhs p.a.) (No other increment) Circle Defence Banking Advisor (CDBA): CTC of Rs. 26.95 lakhs per annum (Fixed Rs 24.50 lakhs p.a., Variable* (10% of Fixed Pay) – Rs 2.45 lakhs p.a.) (No other increment)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SBI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SBI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.state_bank_of_india_sbi: CTC of Rs. 37.95 lakhs p.a. for Defence Banking Advisor (Navy), CTC of Rs. 26.95 lakhs p.a. for Advisor (CAPF) and Circle Defence Banking Advisor.
Max 62 years for Defence Banking Advisor (Navy) and Advisor (CAPF), Max 60 years for Circle Defence Banking Advisor.

content_sections.heading: SBI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SBI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SBI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SBI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Defence Banking Advisor (Navy): Retired from the rank of Vice Admiral/Rear Admiral from Indian Navy. Advisor (Central Armed Police Force): Retired in the rank of Director General (DG) with minimum 3 years experience in CAPF. Circle Defence Banking Advisor (CDBA): Retired from the rank of Major General or Brigadier.

content_sections.heading: SBI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Defence Banking Advisor (Navy): Maximum 62 years Advisor (Central Armed Police Force): Maximum 62 years Circle Defence Banking Advisor (CDBA): Maximum 60 years

content_sections.heading: SBI Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Defence Banking Advisor (Navy): CTC of Rs. 37.95 lakhs per annum (Fixed Rs 34.50 lakhs p.a., Variable* (10% of Fixed Pay): Rs 3.45 lakhs p.a.) (No other increments) Advisor (Central Armed Police Force): CTC of Rs. 26.95 lakhs per annum (Fixed Rs 24.50 lakhs p.a., Variable* (10% of Fixed Pay) – Rs 2.45 lakhs p.a.) (No other increment) Circle Defence Banking Advisor (CDBA): CTC of Rs. 26.95 lakhs per annum (Fixed Rs 24.50 lakhs p.a., Variable* (10% of Fixed Pay) – Rs 2.45 lakhs p.a.) (No other increment)

Online Registration of Application & Payment of Fees Last Date

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SBI Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SBI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SBI Specialist Cadre Officer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the SBI Specialist Cadre Officer posts is 08 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by SBI?
faq.answer: SBI has released a total of 5 vacancies for the Specialist Cadre Officer posts in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for these posts is a graduate degree. However, specific roles have unique eligibility criteria related to prior service experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Circle Defence Banking Advisor (CDBA) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Circle Defence Banking Advisor (CDBA) post is 60 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 750. SC/ST/PwBD candidates are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for SBI Specialist Cadre Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Defence Banking Advisor (Navy) post?
faq.answer: The Defence Banking Advisor (Navy) post offers a CTC of Rs. 37.95 lakhs per annum, which includes fixed and variable pay components.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with no prior experience apply for these posts?
faq.answer: No, these posts are specifically for retired personnel from specific ranks in the Indian Navy, CAPF, or Army with relevant experience. A graduate degree is the minimum educational qualification.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the SBI Specialist Cadre Officer positions?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official SBI careers website. The application process starts on 18 June 2026 and ends on 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the detailed SBI recruitment notification?
faq.answer: The detailed official notification PDF can be accessed via the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly.
